title: Vežba 29

questions.text: Koja rečenica koristi strongly na strengths pravilno?

answers.answer: I weakly believe in our team's weaknesses.
answers.feedback: Weakly je suprotno od strongly, i weaknesses je suprotno od strengths.

answers.answer: I strongly believe in our team's strengths.
Our team's strengths are not very important.
answers.feedback: Ova rečenica ne prikazuje naglasak samopouzdanja ili dobre elemente, koji bi strongly i strengths koristili za prikazivanje.

answers.answer: I doubt that our team has any strengths.
answers.feedback: Ova rečenica kontradiktuše ideju o poverenju u strengths tima.

description:
Strongly koristi se za prikaz visokog nivoa sigurnosti ili poverenja u nešto. Na primer, I strongly believe that this plan will work pokazuje veliku samouverenost u plan.

Strengths odnosi se na dobre ili snažne karakteristike nečega ili osobe. Recimo, One of our team's strengths is our creativity.
